design_philosophy: A high-end, immersive real-money casino gaming experience tailored for mobile-first users. Focus on high-contrast numeric displays, rich jewel tones, and tactile glassmorphic surfaces to convey trust, excitement, and premium quality.

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6

surfaces_and_effects.card_default: bg-surface border border-border shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glass header. Mobile: Bottom navigation bar for quick access to Lobby, Games, Wallet, Profile. Desktop: Top navigation with logo, main links, balance, and user dropdown.
components.buttons: Shadcn based, extended with glowing shadows for primary actions (Deposit, Play). Rounded-md for a structured, trusted tech feel.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Background matches surface, 1px border. On focus, ring with primary color. High contrast text.
components.tables: Shadcn based. Used for game history and admin panel. Grid borders style: subtle right and bottom borders. Mono font for numeric columns (amounts, multipliers, round IDs).
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Used for Aviator multiplier curves and Admin revenue trends. Use primary (gold) and danger (red) colors for chart lines.
components.modals: Shadcn dialog. Glassmorphism backdrop (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm). Dialog box has solid surface bg to prevent content refraction.

animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 10 to 0) for smooth entry.
animations.game_timers: Pulse animation on the last 5 seconds of Win Go timer. Progress bar for betting phases.
animations.toast_notifications: Sonner with dark/light theme matching, entering from bottom-right.

icons.style: Duotone for active menu items, Regular for inactive. Weight: 1.5px for crispness.

images.description: Luxurious abstract deep midnight blue background with sweeping gold and emerald particles. Use for landing page hero section.
Ornate glowing gold crown with emerald gem. Use for VIP rank tier display in profile and dashboard.
Sleek glowing golden mask avatar placeholder. Use for user profiles.
Win Go color prediction game cover. Dark rich background with glowing green, red, violet spheres.
AB Fun Andar Bahar card game cover. Floating elegant playing cards over green velvet.
Aviator crash game cover. Red 3D helicopter flying upwards with ascending neon graph line.
Lucky Hit card comparison game cover. Glowing playing cards clashing with golden sparks.
Soccer Go dice game cover. Glowing dice with football texture on miniature stadium turf.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_strategy: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio minimum for text on interactive elements. Dark mode uses light text; light mode uses dark text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='bet-red-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, sonner, recharts, @radix-ui/react-icons.
Setup Tailwind config to use the defined custom colors as CSS variables to easily support both dark and light modes via a 'dark' class on the HTML/Body element.
Use JetBrains Mono specifically for wallet balance, active game timers, and multipliers to ensure fixed-width numerical stability.
Implement game grids using responsive bento layouts. Give game cards 'group' class to trigger child image zoom on hover (overflow-hidden).
For the Aviator game UI, use a responsive chart component (Recharts or Canvas) with a dynamically curving line mimicking the helicopter's ascent.
Ensure all user actions (deposit, withdraw, bet placement) are clearly separated visually from purely informational areas.
